name: [PDF] Dual-Mode 2T1C DRAM Process-In-Memory Architecture for

name: 2T1C DRAM based on semiconducting MoS 2 and semimetallic
snippet: We propose a 2T1C DRAM structure for in-memory computing. It integrates a monolayer graphene transistor, a monolayer MoS 2 transistor, and a capacitor.
